message:
fix(serialize): harden save/load round-trip against unsupported dtypes and trailing bytes

- Refactor save_state_dict to buffer into Vec<u8> via
  encode_state_dict_to_bytes before writing, so a failed encode
  (unsupported dtype) leaves existing files untouched
- Add explicit dtype guard at encode time (F64/F32 supported; all
  others return TensorIOError::Corrupt)
- load_state_dict_from_bytes now rejects payloads with trailing bytes
  after the declared tensor payload
- 2 new regression tests: trailing-bytes rejection and
  unsupported-dtype leaves existing file untouched

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
